Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 29 

CMPRHNSV_MCO_MOS 

LABEL: Comprehensive Managed Care Organization (MCO) Plan Months 

DESCRIPTION: Number of months the beneficiary was enrolled in a Comprehensive Managed Care Organization 
(MCO) Managed Care Plan in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: CMPRHNSV_MCO_MOS 

LONG NAME: CMPRHNSV_MCO_MOS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

FILE(S): Managed Care 

SOURCE: T-MSIS
